plan.title: Build the risk-tiered judgment-gate engine and verify:judgment-gates

narratives.Description: Introduces plan.policy.judgmentGates with risk tiers auto, review, and block, default-on universal safety gates, and a deterministic scripts/verify_judgment_gates.py wired into task check and pre-push. Gates reuse the triageAutoClassify match DSL plus a new pathspec predicate and record clearances to the durable audit log.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Add scripts/verify_judgment_gates.py with a pathspec matcher, tier evaluation, and three-state exit, plus policy schema entries in scripts/policy.py and a task verify:judgment-gates wiring. 2. Add tests in tests/cli/test_verify_judgment_gates.py covering mechanical fail-closed, declared fail-open, default-on universals, and clearance binding to a cleared_scope fingerprint.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer, I want sensitive changes gated by risk tier, so that secrets and infrastructure edits require human clearance before dispatch.

items.title: Given a diff touching secrets paths, when verify:judgment-gates runs without a clearance, then it fails the check closed.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a diff touching secrets paths, when verify:judgment-gates runs without a clearance, then it fails the check closed.

items.title: Given a tagged declared gate with a recorded clearance, when the gate runs, then it validates the clearance and exits zero.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a tagged declared gate with a recorded clearance, when the gate runs, then it validates the clearance and exits zero.

items.title: When a cleared scope changes after sign-off, then the gate re-triggers and rejects the stale clearance.

narrative.Acceptance: When a cleared scope changes after sign-off, then the gate re-triggers and rejects the stale clearance.

items.title: When judgmentGatesDisabled is unset, then default-on universal gates emit a block-tier requirement for matching changes.

narrative.Acceptance: When judgmentGatesDisabled is unset, then default-on universal gates emit a block-tier requirement for matching changes.

expected_outputs: verify:judgment-gates returns three-state exit on gate evaluation
tests cover mechanical, declared, default-on, and clearance-scope paths

references.title: Issue #1419: RFC: Agentic Prioritization & Coordination Model for Deft Directive
